questions.question: Evaluate i^47.
questions.explanation: Powers of i cycle with period 4. Since 47 = 11(4) + 3, we have i^47 = i^3 = -i.

questions.question: If z = 2 - 3i, find the modulus (absolute value) of z.
questions.explanation: The modulus of a + bi is √(a² + b²). Here, |z| = √(2² + (-3)²) = √(4 + 9) = √13.

questions.question: Divide and express in standard form: (5 + 4i) / (1 - 2i)
questions.explanation: Multiply numerator and denominator by the conjugate (1 + 2i): [(5 + 4i)(1 + 2i)] / [(1 - 2i)(1 + 2i)] = (5 + 10i + 4i - 8) / (1 + 4) = (-3 + 14i) / 5 = -3/5 + 14i/5.

questions.question: A complex number has real part 6 and imaginary part -8. What is the product of this number and its complex conjugate?
questions.explanation: The number is z = 6 - 8i. Its conjugate is 6 + 8i. The product z · z̄ = (6 - 8i)(6 + 8i) = 36 + 64 = 100, which equals |z|².
